choices.text: Domain randomization (vary friction, mass, sensor noise, lighting, textures) + system identification (measure real params, tune sim) + real-world fine-tuning (few hours after sim pretrain). Three pillars.

Imitation learning from demos: VR teleoperation (Aloha, NVIDIA Groot), hand-guided, or kinesthetic. 5-100 demos with modern methods (behavior cloning + DAgger). Then RL fine-tunes. Pure real-RL slow + dangerous.

questions.explanation: Imitation + RL hybrid for real-robot learning.
